mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_COLLECT_HISTORY ( COLLECT_HISTORY_ID, SERVER_ID, SERVER_IP, SOURCE_FILE_PATH, SCHEDULE_TYPE, COLLECT_STATUS, COLLECTED_COUNT, LAST_LINE_NUMBER, FILE_SIZE_BYTES, RETRY_COUNT, FAIL_REASON, COLLECT_START_AT, COLLECT_END_AT, COLLECT_DATE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{collectHistoryId}, #{serverId}, #{serverIp}, #{sourceFilePath}, #{scheduleType}, #{collectStatus}, #{collectedCount}, #{lastLineNumber}, #{fileSizeBytes}, #{retryCount}, #{failReason}, #{collectStartAt}, #{collectEndAt}, #{collectDate}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_COLLECT_HISTORY
COLLECT_STATUS = #{collectStatus},
COLLECTED_COUNT = #{collectedCount},
LAST_LINE_NUMBER = #{lastLineNumber},
FILE_SIZE_BYTES = #{fileSizeBytes},
RETRY_COUNT = #{retryCount},
FAIL_REASON = #{failReason},
COLLECT_END_AT = #{collectEndAt},
UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt}
WHERE COLLECT_HISTORY_ID = #{collectHistoryId}
